announcement_body.headline: Dota 2 Update - 7/1/2026
body: [p]Over the past few days we've made various bug fixes and improvements:[/p]
[b]Dark Carnival[/b]
[list]

[*] Playing Regular and Turbo games now reward Scrap tickets. 6 Scrap can be traded for a Hero ticket of your choice. Regular games reward 2, Turbo games reward 1. Scrap is rewarded regardless of winning or losing.
[*] Seeing Stones can now be earned by playing Co-op Bot Matches on Hard and Unfair difficulties
[*] Candyworks now displays if an offered item is already owned
[*] The Dark Carnival Hero Filter button now shows a tooltip displaying the ticket requirement for the next reward
[*] Fixed the Ticket Trader not working after being unlocked for some players
[*] Fixed Ability Draft and cooperative bot matches not granting Tickets
[*] Fixed Candy Shop Rerolls granted from the Fortune Teller being capped by the weekly maximum
[*] Fixed Pick the Lock area gameplay changing with FPS
[*] Fixed Automaton Personas having the wrong hero chat wheel lines
[/list]
[b]General[/b]
[list]

[*] Players no longer need to select both high-demand roles in order to not spend a Role Queue Game for Ranked Roles. Instead, players need to select at least one of the high-demand roles in order to not spend a Role Queue Game.
[*] Innate abilities with an Area of Effect now correctly display their range in the world when hovering over the ability

[*] Fixed being able to enter the game without a hero in Captain's Mode if your team has picked a hero that is not available for random selection and no one has selected that hero at the end of the picking phase
[*] Fixed bots going after items near or under enemy towers
[*] Fixed bots getting stuck while dewarding
[*] Fixed being unable to close the in-game Coach dialog
[*] Fixed various server and client crashes
[*] Fixed being unable to spectate league matches
[*] Fixed a bug that would sometimes cause ability charges to get stuck for abilities with an Aghanim's Scepter upgrade when repeatedly dropping and picking up the Aghanim's Scepter
[*] Fixed recipes in stash automatically combining when receiving a shard from killing Tormentor
[*] Fixed Tower Glyph of Fortification Multishot attacks incorrectly having True Strike
[*] Fixed Dark Carnival Pies showing which hero is the real one versus an illusion
[*] Fixed sources of cleave benefitting from spell lifesteal
[*] Fixed Granite Golem healing more than expected with its aura
[*] Fixed Prowler's Shaman Desecrate decreasing more than the intended amount of base amor
[*] Fixed Wildwing Ripper's Toughness Aura not functioning as an aura
[/list]
[b]Items[/b]
[list]
[*] Soul Ring's temporary mana now displays as a separate segment in the mana bar while it's available
[*] Fixed Conjurer's Catalyst not working if acquired while dead
[*] Fixed Conjurer's Catalyst Spellover not being affected by Area of Effect bonuses
[*] Fixed Gem of True Sight radius not updating dynamically with Area of Effect changing values
[*] Fixed Hand of Midas proccing Conjurer's Catalyst's Spellover
[*] Fixed Harmonizer not considering abilities with charges on cooldown
[*] Fixed Ironwood Nut giving the wrong primary stat bonus for certain heroes
[*] Fixed Ironwood Nut's bonus stats sometimes not displaying properly
[/list]
[b]Heroes[/b]
[list]
[*] Fixed Alchemist's Unstable Concoction not interacting correctly with Grimstoke's Soulbind
[*] Fixed Arc Warden Tempest Double not copying Ironwood Nut permanent bonus stats
[*] Fixed Arc Warden's Flux with Aghanim's Scepter having a brief window where the target is no longer silenced if one Flux ends on the target while a second Flux is still active on the target
[*] Fixed Arc Warden's Runic Infusion sometimes not immediately calculating the bonus stats when activating a Power Rune
[*] Fixed Bane permanently losing Nightmare if he casts the ability on a debuff immune unit that then attacks a unit that has been Nightmared by Rubick
[*] Fixed Bane's Enfeeble affecting multiple enemies if the enemies were right on top of each other
[*] Fixed Centaur Warrunner's Hoof Stomp triggering magic stick before the ability has finished casting
[*] Fixed Centaur's Retaliate working on reflected damage
[*] Fixed Crystal Maiden's Glacier Guard triggering when using the Twin Gates
[*] Fixed Doom's Devour Aghanim's Shard upgrade not correctly granting the +15% Area of Effect bonuses to stolen creep abilities
[*] Fixed Ember Spirit's Fire Remnant's Shard Upgrade tooltip not specifying a Fire Remnant is spawned when Ember Spirit dies
[*] Fixed Faceless Void's level 20 talent displaying the wrong value for the bonus attack speed given during Chronosphere
[*] Fixed Hoodwink's Bushwhack not always applying the correct amount of total damage
[*] Fixed Invoker's Quas and Exort Shard upgrades not correctly applying on Rubick
[*] Fixed Io's level 15 talent "+50% Spirits Damage" having incorrect text in the talent tree
[*] Fixed Kunkka's level 10 talent slowing enemies via sources of cleave other than Tidebringer
[*] Fixed Lina gaining Fiery Soul Stacks when proccing Maelstrom or Mjollnir under Largo's Croak of Genius buff
[*] Fixed Lone Druid's Spirit Bear immediately dying when resummoned while a wraith due to Wraith King's Aghanim's Scepter
[*] Fixed Disgraced Regalia appearing in Spirit Bear's backpack instead of neutral slot when dying with Divine Regalia
[*] Fixed Spirit Bear getting his Divine Regalia back if he dies independent of Lone Druid
[*] Fixed Monkey King's Changing of the Guard being usable while Taunted
[*] Fixed Muerta's Supernatural having the incorrect number of max stacks
[*] Fixed Necrophos's Reaper Scythe gaining permanent stacks when killing illusions
[*] Fixed Oracle's False Promise Damage Indicator visual effects not properly calculating lethal damage
[*] Fixed Oracle's False Promise Damage Indicator visual effects not properly showing the heal visual effects if the target is going to be healed when the effect ends
[*] Fixed Oracle's level 25 talent "Fortune's End constantly Dispels" incorrectly piercing Debuff Immunity when affecting enemies
[*] Fixed Phantom Lancer Juxtapose Shard blocking creep camps permanently
[*] Fixed Primal Beast being able to damage enemies with Onslaught twice when queuing the Onslaught and stop commands after a forced movement during Pulverize
[*] Fixed Razor's Storm Surge Aghanim's Shard upgrade not always correctly applying
[*] Fixed Rubick not spawning an urnaconda when stealing it from Shadow Shaman
[*] Fixed Shadow Fiend being able to stack infinite souls using Feast of Souls with an Octarine Core
[*] Fixed Slardar's Corrosive Haze remaining duration being reduced when re-applied by Slithereen Crush with Aghanim's Shard upgrade
[*] Fixed Sniper's Keen Scope not being disabled by Break
[*] Fixed Storm Spirit's Overload ability with Aghanim's Shard applying 6 sources of damage instead of 3 if activating while already having an Overload buff
[*] Fixed Tinker's Keen Conveyance at level 3 sometimes targeting friendly heroes instead of the fountain when the ability was self cast
[*] Fixed Vengeful Spirit's Vengeance Aura self-bonus sometimes getting lost after using Manta Style
[*] Fixed Warlock's level 15 talent "+8 Upheaval Attack Speed per second on Allies" causing Eldritch Summoning to create Imps when allies die
[*] Fixed Winter Wyvern's Cold Embrace with Aghanim's Shard casting a Splinter Blast on enemies if the enemies were right on top of each other
[*] Fixed Wraith King's Vampiric Spirit not turning Wraith King into a wraith if he levels up at the same time as dying
[/list]
